notes: More sites download successfully — when a site's video can't be read the usual way, News.Ripper now automatically tries its built-in browser analyzer instead of giving up (fixes some local-news and network-affiliate pages, e.g. NBC-owned stations).
Includes the 'Swell' redesign and all 3.8.x/3.9.x capabilities: hardware-accelerated conversions, parallel downloads, self-updating engine, and YouTube live-stream support.
